title: HOCL – Apprentices – 30 Posts

basic_details.job_title: HOCL Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 30 Posts
basic_details.short_information: HOCL has published the Apprentices Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 30 Trade, Graduate, Technician Apprentices posts through HOCL. Apply online by June 08. Salary ₹10,560-12,300. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.
basic_details.post_name: Trade Apprentice (ITI holders) | Graduate Apprentice (B.Tech/B.E.) | Technician Apprentice (Diploma holders)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only - Trade Apprentices: via NAPS portal (apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) | Graduate & Technician Apprentices: via NATS portal (nats.education.gov.in)

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Engineering in the relevant discipline from a recognized institution, passed during 2022–2026. Percentage of marks in qualifying exam is mandatory - must be entered in the "% of Marks/CGPA" column on NATS portal; if not furnished, candidature will not be considered.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on % of marks in qualifying exam + Certificate Verification + Written Test / Skill Test / Interview + Medical Fitness
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply exclusively through the respective portal based on their qualification category. No applications through any other method or platform will be considered.
seo_tags: Hindustan Organic Chemicals Limited Apprentices Recruitment 2026
